title: fragariastrum camillae
intro: Fragariastrum camillae, also known as Camillia strawberry or Camellia fragaria, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the Camellia family. It is native to China and is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its astringent and anti-inflammatory effects. The plant's leaves and flowers are used to prepare herbal remedies that can help to alleviate symptoms of fever, cough, and sore throat, while also providing relief from digestive issues and menstrual cramps. Herbal preparations of Fragariastrum camillae can be made into teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to experience its health benefits, including improved immune function and reduced inflammation.
